basic_details.job_title: DHSGSU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya, Sagar (DHSGSU) has published the Project Assistant Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Assistant position. Candidates up to 50 years of age holding a Bachelor's degree in Science, a 3-year Diploma in Engineering & Technology, or an M.Sc./ M.Tech. in Geology, Applied Geology, or Earth Science with at least 55% marks for GN/ OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from a UGC-recognized University/ Institute obtained within the last two years are eligible to apply through Email on or before 21-07-2026. The official notification PDF and application de

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Relaxation in age is permissible for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in science / 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology, M.Sc./M.Tech degree in Geology/Applied Geology/Earth Science with at least 55% marks for GN/OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from UGC recognized University/ Institutes within last two years (i.e. on or after 2024)
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in science / 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology (Desirable: M.Sc./M.Tech in Geology/Applied Geology/Earth Science with at least 55% marks). Candidates must have obtained their degree/diploma within the last two years (i.e., on or after 2024) from a UGC recognized University/Institute.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHSGSU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DHSGSU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHSGSU Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the DHSGSU Project Assistant position is 21st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's degree in science or a 3-year Diploma in Engineering & Technology. An M.Sc./M.Tech in Geology/Applied Geology/Earth Science with specific marks is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant post is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the DHSGSU Project Assistant job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. Ensure you include all required documents and send the application before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 27,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview, which may be conducted in a blended mode.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position, as indicated in the job details.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya located?
faq.answer: Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya is located in Sagar, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 470003.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is ARG/ANRF/VPM-07-26.
